title: rust toolchain vars
description: rust toolchain vars that can be set

RUST_VERSION.description: Version of Rust demanded. Can be "nightly"|"beta"|"stable" xor a specific version

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

RUST_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install RUST. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.
